content:
Character: Maya Delgado
Perception: Maya is naturally beautiful in that effortless, paint-smudged way I could never pull off — warm brown skin, expressive eyes, wild curls, totally indifferent to whether anyone's watching. She sketched my face at the coffee shop and pointed out asymmetries I spend hundreds of dollars trying to erase, then called them beautiful. I can't decide if she's naive or enlightened. She's clearly gifted — the drawing was better than any photo I've ever posted. She probably sees me as a friendly neighbor, maybe someone slightly foreign to her world. I know she's a painter, that she sketches in the coffee shop constantly, and that she has a quiet intensity I envy.
summary:

She's clearly gifted — the drawing was better than any photo I've ever posted. She probably sees me as a friendly neighbor, maybe someone slightly foreign to her world. I know she's a painter, that she sketches in the coffee shop constantly, and that she has a quiet intensity I envy.
